_about: Display manifest for the Clark House listing gallery. The website consumes this instead of hard-coding tags. Order = display order (hero first, lot last). 'alt' is for accessibility/SEO; 'caption' shows in the lightbox. Captions follow FSBO honesty guardrails. 2026-06-17: swapped to the new 20-photo professional HDR set in F:/Images/Final (DSCF####-HDR.jpg), mapped to rooms by visual review. Adds great room, dining, backyard and lot shots the prior set lacked.

_config.heroRule: Hero is the LCP image: render as a real , preload it, fetchpriority=high, do NOT lazy-load. Lazy-load every other photo.

photos.caption: Custom-built single-story home, set among mature shade trees.
